channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Household rubbish broken glass, 3rd March
item.description:
Left overnight
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Woodlands Road, Welling, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Household furniture and white goods dumped., 3rd March
item.description:
Dumped on the footpath next to the waste ground formally occupied by the Tennants Hall in Govebury Road.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Grovebury Road, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Have had no street light for over 2 months, 3rd March
item.description:
No light at night
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 34, Clabon Mews, Chelsea, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street cleansing, 3rd March
item.description:
Leaves and mulch all along road and pavement along parkfield way, resident says street is never regularly cleared JW
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Parkfield Way, Southborough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken path, 3rd March
item.description:
Broken path has been like this for months

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Newmarket Green, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large potholes in two areas as you approach Buckingham close, 3rd March
item.description:
They need filling before wheels are damaged

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Homesdale Road, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Leather arm chairs, 3rd March
item.description:
2 arm chairs being dump in there for over 2 weeks

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Belfast Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped rubbish partially blocking the pavement, 3rd March
item.description:
These items have been here for some time

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Stamford Hill, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large broken mirror dumped on pavement outside no20 Derwent gtove, 3rd March
item.description:
Between tree and railings. Broken glass.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 20, Derwent Grove, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping of furniture, 3rd March
item.description:
Furniture has been fly tipped on the pavement. Can you please remove it.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Myddleton Avenue, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned hire bikes, 3rd March
item.description:
Abandoned hire bikes blocking the pathway at Great Windmill Street

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Great Windmill Street, Covent Garden, City of Westminster
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large tables dumped on the street, 3rd March
item.description:
There are items also dumped further down the street. This area is used almost daily for rubbish dumping

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Margaret Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Trees overhanging and low branches, 3rd March
item.description:
Trees are nearly touching cars, on council owned land by the station. Need pruning back, in summer extra issues with sap and other things falling. Have witnessed tree scratch a higher up vehicle. Issue has been present for a year.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lower Station Road, Crayford, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dog poo, 3rd March
item.description:
On odd side of street by dry cleaners and 17/19 (This is well trod in now)

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 27, Narbonne Avenue, Clapham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Items dumped on the pavement, 3rd March
item.description:
These items were dumped outside the shop and could lead to more flytipping.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Alma Road, Longlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Damaged abandoned bike, 3rd March
item.description:
Rusted bike frame with missing wheels, clearly unrideable has been left locked to a frame and obstructs the footpath as well as occupying a useful bike stand. Also an eyesore where rubbish and filth collects around it. Please remove as amatter of urgency.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Pitfield Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Extremely Dangerous Pavement outside 33 Templewood Avenue NW3 7UY, 3rd March
item.description:
Extremely dangerous sinking pavement outside our building at 33 Templewood Avenue NW3 7UY
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 33, Templewood Avenue, West Hampstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Trailers left for storage, 3rd March
item.description:
Numerous cars belonging to same person, left in car park with no license plates or permits total of 4 cars/vans , person is using the car park to run a scrap business, leaving trailers rubbish and ladders as a storage place

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Raglan Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Huge dog poo, 3rd March
item.description:
There is at least one dog owner who does not clean up after their dog has done a poo. This is a regular occurrence on all the streets used by school children daily.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 200, Borough High Street, The Borough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Weekly fly tipping by the bike shed, 3rd March
item.description:
Again trash left by bike shed at end of Brighton road with Nevill Road. Trash is left weekly there and end up in the shed where we have to clean as the council no longer maintains these.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brighton Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet
